title: Binary Tree Pruning
hints: A subtree should be kept only if it contains at least one 1. How can you determine this property for a node based on its children?
Use post-order traversal to process children before the parent. A node is pruned if it is 0 and both its subtrees are pruned.
Recursively call on left and right children. Update the current node's children to the returned roots. Return None if current is 0 and both children are None.
